001package net.okocraft.box.api.event.stock;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.model.item.BoxItem;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006
007import java.util.Objects;
008
009/**
010 * A {@link StockEvent} called when the stock is decreased.
011 */
012public class StockDecreaseEvent extends StockEvent {
013
014    private final BoxItem item;
015    private final int decrements;
016    private final int amount;
017
018    /**
019     * The constructor of {@link StockEvent}.
020     *
021     * @param stockHolder   the stockholder of the event
022     * @param item          the item of the stock
023     * @param decrements    the amount of decreased
024     * @param currentAmount the current amount of the stock
025     */
026    public StockDecreaseEvent(@NotNull StockHolder stockHolder, @NotNull BoxItem item,
027                              int decrements, int currentAmount) {
028        super(stockHolder);
029        this.item = Objects.requireNonNull(item);
030        this.decrements = decrements;
031        this.amount = currentAmount;
032    }
033
034    /**
035     * Gets the item of the stock
036     *
037     * @return the item of the stock
038     */
039    public @NotNull BoxItem getItem() {
040        return item;
041    }
042
043    /**
044     * Gets the amount of decreased.
045     *
046     * @return the amount of decreased
047     */
048    public int getDecrements() {
049        return decrements;
050    }
051
052    /**
053     * Gets the current amount of the stock.
054     *
055     * @return the current amount of the stock
056     */
057    public int getAmount() {
058        return amount;
059    }
060
061    @Override
062    public String toString() {
063        return "StockDecreaseEvent{" +
064                "stockholder=" + getStockHolder() +
065                ", item=" + item +
066                ", decrements=" + decrements +
067                ", amount=" + amount +
068                '}';
069    }
070}
